description: Practical examples for building with modern OpenAI APIs.
useCase: Rapidly prototype assistants, extraction flows, and eval-ready API integrations.

description: Core library for transformer models across tasks.
useCase: Train and fine-tune state-of-the-art language and vision models with one standard API.

description: Framework for building LLM applications with composable chains, tools, and agent workflows.
SDK for orchestrating AI functions, plugins, and multi-step copilot experiences across languages.
Utility for converting diverse document formats into markdown for downstream AI pipelines.
Collection of reusable agent skills and guidance patterns for practical AI-assisted development workflows.
useCase: Adopt prebuilt skill instructions to improve consistency and quality across coding-agent tasks.

description: Toolkit for guiding AI coding agents toward minimal, practical implementation patterns.
useCase: Standardize agent behavior so teams produce simpler, lower-maintenance code during AI-assisted development.

description: Comprehensive Claude Code optimization system covering skills, memory, security, and agent workflows.
useCase: Improve AI coding throughput with a battle-tested configuration stack for Claude Code and related tools.

description: AI coding assistant skill that builds a queryable knowledge graph across code, schemas, infrastructure, and docs.
useCase: Index an application stack into a single knowledge graph so coding agents can reason across app code, database schema, and infrastructure together.

description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token usage for common development commands.
useCase: Cut token spend during daily coding sessions while keeping existing AI-assisted terminal workflows.

title: pxpipe
description: Proxy that reduces LLM token costs by converting large text contexts into images for vision-capable models.
useCase: Lower token spend on large code, log, and conversation inputs when using multimodal models, with a trade-off in exact-text reliability.

title: Attention Is All You Need
summary: Introduces the transformer architecture and self-attention, replacing recurrence for more parallel and scalable sequence modeling.
description: Foundational transformer paper introducing self-attention as the core sequence modeling mechanism.

title: GPT-4 Technical Report
summary: Documents GPT-4 capabilities, limitations, and safety considerations across a broad set of benchmark and real-world tasks.
description: Technical report covering capability and safety characteristics of GPT-4.

title: AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation
summary: Presents a framework where multiple LLM agents collaborate through conversation to solve complex tasks with tools and delegation.
description: Introduces an agent conversation framework for collaborative task solving with LLM systems.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
summary: Combines parametric language generation with external document retrieval to improve factuality and knowledge coverage.
description: Seminal RAG paper combining parametric generation with non-parametric memory retrieval.

title: RAGAS: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation
summary: Defines automated evaluation metrics for retrieval quality and response faithfulness in production RAG pipelines.
description: Defines automated metrics and evaluation patterns for RAG quality tracking.

title: Ponytail Agent Rule Pack
description: A practical rule pack for steering coding agents toward concise and maintainable outputs.
useCase: Apply consistent guidance patterns across agent-assisted development workflows.

title: ECC Optimization Playbook
description: A structured optimization playbook for Claude Code with reusable skills and workflow patterns.
useCase: Bootstrap stronger coding-agent defaults for quality, security, and speed.

title: Graphify Knowledge Graph Skill
description: Turns heterogeneous project assets into a queryable knowledge graph for coding agents.
useCase: Help agents reason across code, docs, and infra context from one graph-backed index.

title: Jira Validator Skill Bundle
description: Local skill bundle for validating Jira fields, transitions, and project-specific issue hygiene patterns.
useCase: Download and import into Claude to enforce Jira ticket quality checks in agent-driven workflows.

title: WikiLLM Pattern (Andrej Karpathy)
description: A practical pattern for building wiki-style, citation-oriented notes with LLMs through iterative drafting and refinement.
useCase: Create compact, source-aware explainers from scattered references when exploring a new technical topic.
